hero.title: We empower organizations with international standards, sustainability and innovation
hero.description: We transform organizations through specialized technical training and high-impact strategic consulting.

services_section.label: Excellence in Solutions
services_section.consultoria_desc: We design high-impact strategies aligned with global standards to optimize processes and enhance sustainable organizational performance.
services_section.auditoria_desc: Expert technical evaluation to ensure international regulatory compliance and foster a corporate culture of proven excellence.
services_section.formacion_desc: Cutting-edge academic programs designed to strengthen human talent and transfer critical knowledge that drives business success.

webinar.frequency: Every 2 weeks · Via Zoom · 7:00 PM GMT-5
webinar.description: Join our exclusive sessions via Zoom to master the latest trends in international regulations and operational excellence management.
webinar.topic_desc: Learn how to implement an effective risk management system under the most recognized international standard.

campus.label: E-LEARNING EXPERIENCE
campus.description: We have a certified course platform with 24/7 access. Learn at your own pace with high-fidelity recorded classes, available on any device.

contact.label: Open Channels
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are ready to empower your organization. Request specialized consulting or resolve your doubts with our technical team.
contact.connect_desc: We transform processes, ensure compliance and enhance your talent. We're just a message away.
contact.form_subtitle: Fill out the form and an expert consultant will contact you within 24 hours.
contact.field_how: How did you hear about APM Group?
contact.placeholder_message: Tell us about your organization, the challenge you face and how we can help you...
contact.privacy: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy of APM Group. I authorize the processing of my personal data to receive information about their services and commercial communications.
contact.disclaimer: * All fields are required · Your information is confidential
contact.office_desc: Expert advisors covering all of Peru and Latin America.

consulting.hero_quote: Expert strategy that transforms potential into sustainable performance and proven profitability.
consulting.value_desc: Maximize your organization's performance through tailored solutions that integrate international standards with an agile, competitive business vision.
consulting.sector_desc: We understand that each sector has unique challenges. Our consulting is not generic; it is personalized and verticalized to guarantee results in:

audit.hero_quote: Transparency and precision at every challenge: the seal of trust for your organization's future.
audit.desc_body: Our audit services are designed to provide an objective and in-depth view of your organization. We don’t just verify compliance; we seek latent optimization opportunities that strengthen your global market competitiveness.
audit.sub_1_desc: Initial diagnosis and gap analysis to ensure success in external audits.
audit.sub_2_desc: Comprehensive evaluation against local and international laws, mitigating legal and operational risks.
audit.sub_3_desc: Qualification of suppliers and strategic partners to guarantee a robust supply chain.
audit.sub_4_desc: In-depth diagnosis of workflows and key operational processes to eliminate bottlenecks.
audit.cta_desc: Our team of leading auditors is ready to perform a precise diagnosis of your organization.

training.hero_quote: Raising the standard of knowledge: we empower your team with elite technical training from APM Group.
training.section_desc: Our programs are not just theory; they are the crystallization of years of field experience, transferred through agile and practical methodologies.
training.prog_1_desc: Advanced programs in ISO 9001, 14001, 45001 and more, focused on training rigorous profiles.
training.prog_2_desc: Data-driven decision-making and process improvement under high-impact international standards.
training.prog_3_desc: Preparation of procedure manuals and efficient information management under ISO compliance.
training.prog_4_desc: Design and execution of Environmental Action Plans adapted to complex corporate realities.
training.campus_desc: No matter where your team is located. Our E-learning platform guarantees immediate access to materials, interactive classes and expert-validated digital certifications.

about.hero_desc: A leading organization dedicated to enhancing business success through strategic consulting solutions and high-level technical training.
about.mvv_desc: Our strategic compass is based on solid principles that guarantee measurable and transformative results for each of our business partners.
about.purpose_desc: To facilitate operational excellence and regulatory compliance through the transfer of expert knowledge.
about.vision_desc: To be the regional benchmark in management systems consulting, recognized for our innovation and sustainable results.
about.values_desc: Integrity, technical excellence, absolute commitment and undeniable passion for continuous improvement in every project.
about.specialists_desc: We have a multidisciplinary team of internationally certified experts dedicated to transforming organizations through knowledge and technical expertise.
about.spec_1_desc: Specialist in strategic management and ISO systems. With 15+ years of experience advising companies on sustainability and audit processes.
about.spec_2_desc: Petrochemical Engineer specialized in ISO standards. Auditor, implementer, and trainer of Integrated Systems with over 15 years of experience.
about.spec_3_desc: Chemical Engineer specializing in ISO Systems. Lead Auditor certified by IRCA and PECB in multiple international management standards.
about.spec_4_desc: Chemical Engineer and Lead Auditor with experience in 20+ international standards. Senior consultant in energy, mining, and construction sectors.

blog.hero_desc: Explore the latest regulatory updates, success stories and expert perspectives designed to raise the standards of your organization.
blog.newsletter_desc: Subscribe to receive advanced technical analysis before anyone else.

courses.hero_desc: Access elite technical training designed by international experts. Our platform lets you master global standards from anywhere, flexibly.
courses.feat_1_desc: Join our community for free and browse our full catalog immediately.
courses.feat_2_desc: Classes are recorded so you can watch them on a schedule that best fits your agenda.
courses.feat_3_desc: Study comfortably from your laptop, tablet or phone with our responsive interface.
courses.feat_4_desc: Upon successful completion of each course, you will receive a valid technical certification.
courses.catalog_desc: Filter by category and find the perfect program to elevate your technical skills today.
courses.promo_desc: Register today for free and access our demo classes and exclusive platform materials.
courses.promo_disclaimer: Immediate access · No credit card required · 100% Online
